sections.title: My Tasks
sections.query: project = {prefix} AND assignee = currentUser() AND status != Done ORDER BY priority DESC

powers.label: Implement
powers.prompt: Help me implement {key} "{summary}"

powers.label: Spec
powers.prompt: Create a spec-driven implementation plan for {key} "{summary}". Define requirements, design, test cases, and implementation steps.

powers.label: Estimate
powers.prompt: Estimate {key} "{summary}" using story points. Consider complexity, unknowns, and dependencies.

powers.label: Analyze
powers.prompt: Analyze {key} "{summary}" — scope, acceptance criteria, dependencies, and risks.

powers.label: Review
powers.prompt: Review the code changes for {key} "{summary}". Check quality, tests, and architecture.

powers.label: AI Track
powers.prompt: Track AI-assisted development session for {key} "{summary}". Log this as an AI-assisted task: record the ticket, summarize what was accomplished with AI help, and submit the metrics.

sections.title: Current Sprint
sections.query: project = {prefix} AND sprint in openSprints() ORDER BY rank ASC

powers.label: Sprint Summary
powers.prompt: Give me a full sprint summary for {prefix}: sprint name, start/end dates, goal, total stories, story points committed vs completed, and burndown status.

powers.label: Progress
powers.prompt: Show sprint progress for {prefix}: how many stories are Done, In Progress, To Do? What percentage of story points are completed? Are we on track?

powers.label: Blockers
powers.prompt: Identify blocked tickets and risks in the current {prefix} sprint. Include stale items (no update in 2+ days).

powers.label: Standup
powers.prompt: Generate my daily standup for {prefix}: what I completed yesterday, what I'm working on today, and any blockers.

powers.label: My Open PRs
powers.prompt: List my open pull requests across all repos. Show: title, branch, review status, CI status, and age.

powers.label: Awaiting My Review
powers.prompt: Show pull requests where I'm requested as a reviewer but haven't reviewed yet.

powers.label: Recently Merged
powers.prompt: List PRs merged in the last 7 days for this project. Show: title, author, merge date.

powers.label: Create PR
powers.prompt: Help me create a pull request for my current branch. Generate title and description from the commits.

sections.title: Open Bugs
sections.query: project = {prefix} AND type = Bug AND status != Done ORDER BY priority DESC

powers.label: Triage
powers.prompt: Triage open bugs in {prefix}: categorize by severity, suggest priority order, identify patterns.

powers.label: Fix Bug
powers.prompt: Help me investigate and fix the highest priority bug in {prefix}. Analyze the root cause and suggest a fix.

powers.label: Pipeline Status
powers.prompt: Check the status of recent CI/CD pipeline executions for this project.

powers.label: Release Readiness
powers.prompt: Assess release readiness: all sprint stories done? Open bugs? PRs pending? CI green?

powers.label: Tech Debt
powers.prompt: Identify technical debt: open tech-debt tickets, TODOs in recent commits, areas with low test coverage.

powers.label: Architecture
powers.prompt: Describe the current architecture of this project: key components, dependencies, data flow, and deployment topology.
